flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Alverno College fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (858 → 631).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Alverno College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (724 vs 977).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Alverno College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (69.3% → 61.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alverno College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
